query: SELECT @@global.time_zone AS global_tz, @@session.time_zone AS session_tz, TIMEDIFF(NOW(), UTC_TIMESTAMP()) AS tz_offset;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT @@global.time_zone AS global_tz, @@session.time_zone AS session_tz, TIMEDIFF(NOW(), UTC_TIMESTAMP()) AS tz_offset;
